title: Mnemosyne
content:
In classic beauty, cold, immaculate,
    A voiceful sculpture, stern and still she stands,
    Upon her brow deep-chiselled love and hate,
    That sorrow o'er dead roses in her hands.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "Mnemosyne"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
